name: Tool Card: Grep
summary: Displays grep search results with matched content and context lines
goals: Render grep search results with highlighted match context
Show pattern, file paths, and matched lines

specDetail.description: A specialized tool card for grep content search operations. Displays the search pattern, matched files, matched lines with context, and highlight the matching portions.

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.description: Regex pattern used for the search

parameters.name: matches
parameters.description: Array of match objects with filePath, lineNumber, lineContent, and context

constraints: Must highlight the matching portion within each line
Must group results by file path
Must support collapsible file groups when many files match

acceptanceCriteria.given: a grep search operation returns matches
acceptanceCriteria.then: the pattern, file count, and highlighted matches are displayed grouped by file

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
